services.name: Engine Diagnostics
services.description: Advanced OBD-II scanning, check engine light diagnosis, and computer-based fault detection.

services.name: Engine Repair & Rebuild
services.description: Complete engine teardown, inspection, and rebuild with OEM-quality parts.

services.name: Timing Belt / Chain Replacement
services.description: Replace worn timing belts or chains to prevent catastrophic engine failure.

services.name: Head Gasket Repair
services.description: Fix blown head gaskets, resurface cylinder heads, and restore compression.

services.name: Full Synthetic Oil Change
services.description: Premium full-synthetic oil, new filter, and 21-point inspection included.

services.name: Transmission Fluid Flush
services.description: Complete flush and refill of automatic or manual transmission fluid.

services.name: Coolant System Flush
services.description: Drain, flush, and refill coolant system to prevent overheating.

services.name: Brake Fluid Replacement
services.description: Bleed and replace brake fluid for optimal braking performance.

services.name: Brake Pad Replacement
services.description: Install new ceramic or semi-metallic brake pads on front or rear axle.

services.name: Brake Rotor Resurfacing / Replacement
services.description: Resurface or replace warped rotors for smooth, safe stopping.

services.name: Brake Caliper Repair
services.description: Rebuild or replace seized or leaking brake calipers.

services.name: Tire Replacement & Mounting
services.description: Supply and mount new tires, including balancing and valve stems.

services.name: Wheel Alignment
services.description: Precision 4-wheel alignment using laser-guided equipment.

services.name: Tire Rotation & Balancing
services.description: Rotate and rebalance all four tires for even tread wear.

services.name: Flat Tire Repair
services.description: Patch or plug punctured tires and restore to safe pressure.

services.name: Battery Testing & Replacement
services.description: Load-test battery and install new one if needed with warranty.

services.name: Alternator Repair / Replacement
services.description: Diagnose charging issues and replace faulty alternators.

services.name: Starter Motor Replacement
services.description: Replace worn starter motor for reliable engine cranking.

services.name: Wiring & Lighting Repair
services.description: Fix faulty wiring, headlights, tail lights, and interior lighting.

services.name: Shock & Strut Replacement
services.description: Replace worn shocks or struts for a smoother, safer ride.

services.name: Power Steering Repair
services.description: Fix leaks, replace pump, or flush power steering system.

services.name: Ball Joint / Tie Rod Replacement
services.description: Replace worn steering and suspension linkage components.

services.name: Exhaust System Repair
services.description: Weld, patch, or replace damaged muffler, pipes, and catalytic converter.

services.name: Emissions Testing & Repair
services.description: Perform emissions test and fix issues to pass inspection.

services.name: AC Recharge & Repair
services.description: Evacuate, recharge refrigerant, and repair leaks in AC system.

services.name: Heater Core Replacement
services.description: Replace clogged or leaking heater core for cabin heating.

services.name: Dent Removal (PDR)
services.description: Paintless dent repair for minor dents and dings without repainting.

services.name: Scratch & Paint Repair
services.description: Color-matched paint touch-up, scratch buffing, and panel repaint.

services.name: Full Body Respray
services.description: Complete vehicle repaint with primer, base coat, and clear coat.

services.name: Clutch Replacement
services.description: Replace worn clutch disc, pressure plate, and throw-out bearing.

services.name: Gearbox Repair
services.description: Diagnose and repair manual or automatic gearbox issues.

services.name: Full Vehicle Inspection
services.description: Comprehensive 50-point safety and mechanical inspection report.

services.name: Pre-Purchase Inspection
services.description: Thorough inspection before buying a used vehicle — engine, body, frame.

services.name: Scheduled Maintenance Service
services.description: Manufacturer-recommended service at mileage intervals (30k, 60k, 90k).

testimonials.name: Robert H.
testimonials.text: Outstanding service! They diagnosed an engine issue other shops missed. Fair pricing too.

testimonials.name: Maria G.
testimonials.text: Best AC repair I have ever had. My car feels brand new in this heat!

testimonials.name: Kevin T.
testimonials.text: Quick oil change and they caught a brake issue before it became dangerous. Highly recommend.

testimonials.name: Jennifer L.
testimonials.text: The body work was flawless. You cannot even tell where the dent used to be!
